free_text: Neutron capture cross-section measurements of 99-Tc up
10-g metal sample of 99Tc in a double-sealed aluminum
Liquid scintillator to detect capture gammas.
measurements used to normalize capture yield at low
Data corrected for self-shielding and multiple
Total uncertainty from statistical errors and
Data taken from private comm., Block, 1977/12.
Total uncertainty from statistical errors and
Data taken from private comm., Little,
1977/7/20. Partially shown in Table I page 574.
The capture data were reduced to capture yields. The
transmission data were used to normalize the capture
yield in the low-energy region. The capture yields
divided by sample thickness (cross sections) were
plotted versus neutron time of flight.
Data corrected for self-shielding and multiple neutron
scattering by the method of H.W.Schmitt (1960).
